commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The PR is member-authored and draft, and the remaining action is maintainer/runtime confirmation of the proof check identity rather than an automation-safe repair job.; Cleared: The diff only changes local check classification and a unit test; it does not add dependencies, permissions, secrets handling, downloads, or new code execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR makes cancelled Real behavior proof checks count as pending instead of terminal while preserving terminal handling for other cancelled required checks.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes a completed CANCELLED check into terminalBlockers, and automerge readiness checks terminalBlockers before pending checks. I did not reproduce a live cancelled replacement proof handoff, so the exact GitHub check identity remains the main uncertainty.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is member-authored and draft, and the remaining action is maintainer/runtime confirmation of the proof check identity rather than an automation-safe repair job.
